title: mercurialis annua subvar. euannua
intro: Mercurialis annua subvar. euannua is a plant species, commonly known as the annual mercury or lesser mercury, which is a subspecies of the annual mercury plant. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mercurialis annua subvar. euannua include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
